_note: COMMITTED FIXTURE (FLOW_PLAN H5, H4 precedent) — a small, representative slice of ToolUniverse v1.3.1's tool surface used to drive the gateway contract deterministically WHILE THE RUNTIME IS ABSENT. It is metadata (tool names/categories/hosts) only — NEVER a fabricated tool RESULT. The full 600-1000+ library is reached via execute_tool only when the runtime is present (input-gated), and ONLY for tools on this vetted retrieval allow-list (default-deny). Code-execution and autonomous/loader/compose tools are listed with disabled:true; the gateway hard-denies them regardless of this file. Each vetted retrieval tool declares its single upstream `host`, which must be on egress-allowlist.js — that is the egress bound enforced on every forward.
